raw_consumer_statement:
Company : Citibank , N.A . Macys American Express Card Issue : Billing dispute Merchandise not as described chargeback reversal Complaint : I am filing a complaint regarding a billing dispute that was improperly resolved on my Macys American Express XXXX  card account ending in XXXX XX/XX/year>, I was charged {$530.00} for clothing purchased from an online merchant. When I received the items, they were significantly different from what was advertised. The clothes had no tags/no labels, broken stitching/loose threads, missing buttons/unfinished parts, incorrect sizing, and extremely poor quality. They appeared used, wrinkled, and misrepresented. I immediately contacted the merchant and requested a return and full refund. The merchant refused to provide a proper return and instead repeatedly offered partial refunds of 20 %, 25 %, and 30 % if I kept the defective merchandise. They also required approximately {$400.00} in international return shipping to XXXX, which was unreasonable. Because the merchandise was not as described and the merchant refused to resolve the issue, I disputed the charge with Citibank. Citibank initially ruled in my favor and issued a credit. However, on XX/XX/year>, the same amount of {$530.00} was re-charged to my account as a XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX. Citibank later denied my dispute and required me to pay the charge, which I paid in XXXX XXXX believe this decision was incorrect and did not properly consider the fact that the merchandise was misrepresented and defective. I still have the merchandise in my possession and have photographs and email correspondence showing : The items received were not as described ; The merchant refused to accept a reasonable return. The merchant attempted to pressure me into accepting partial refunds instead of honoring a full return. Under the Fair Credit Billing Act, this qualifies as merchandise not delivered as agreed. 
I am requesting : A full refund of {$530.00} A proper review of my dispute with consideration of the documentation This situation has caused me financial loss and distress, and I am requesting Citibank correct this billing error. 
Sincerely, XXXX XXXX
